executive_summary: Build failure analysis for scib_demo repository on main branch. The build failed due to GitHub Actions workflow configuration issues. The workflow dispatch endpoint returned HTTP 404 Not Found, indicating that the workflow file (.github/workflows/build.yml) is either missing, inaccessible, or GitHub Actions is disabled for this repository. This is a critical configuration error that prevents any build execution from occurring.

errors.title: GitHub Actions Workflow File Not Found
errors.description: The GitHub Actions workflow dispatch endpoint returned HTTP 404 Not Found when attempting to trigger the build workflow. The workflow file at .github/workflows/build.yml is either missing from the repository, not accessible with the current permissions, or GitHub Actions is disabled.
errors.error_message: HTTP Error 404: Not Found. Workflow dispatch endpoint returned 404. Possible causes: token missing workflow/actions permissions, workflow not accessible on this repo/branch, or Actions disabled. dispatch_url=https://api.github.com/repos/loginkarun/scib_demo/actions/workflows/.github%2Fworkflows%2Fbuild.yml/dispatches response_body={"message":"Not Found","documentation_url":"https://docs.github.com/rest/actions/workflows#create-a-workflow-dispatch-event","status":"404"}
errors.root_cause: The workflow file .github/workflows/build.yml does not exist in the repository at the specified branch (main), or the GitHub token lacks the necessary permissions to access/trigger workflows, or GitHub Actions is disabled for this repository.
errors.impact: Complete build pipeline failure. No builds can be executed until the workflow file is created or the configuration issue is resolved. This blocks all CI/CD automation including compilation, testing, and deployment processes.

errors.title: Missing Action URL in Build Failure Metadata
errors.description: The build failure metadata file contains an empty action_url field, indicating that no GitHub Actions workflow run was created. This prevents detailed log analysis and troubleshooting.
errors.error_message: action_url field is empty in logs/build_failure_attempt-3.json. No workflow run was initiated due to the 404 error.
errors.root_cause: Since the workflow dispatch request failed with 404, no workflow run was created, resulting in no action URL being generated.
errors.impact: Unable to access detailed workflow execution logs through GitHub Actions UI. Limits troubleshooting capabilities to the dispatch error message only.

recommended_fixes.description: Create the missing .github/workflows/build.yml file in the scib_demo repository on the main branch.
steps: 3. Create build.yml file with appropriate Maven/Gradle build configuration
4. Ensure the workflow includes: checkout, Java setup, build steps, and test execution
5. Commit and push the workflow file to the main branch
6. Verify GitHub Actions is enabled in repository settings
recommended_fixes.automation_script: Use GitHub Feature Branch Script Committer to create .github/workflows/build.yml with standard Maven build configuration

recommended_fixes.description: Ensure the GitHub token has the necessary permissions to trigger workflows.
steps: 2. Verify token has write access to the repository
3. Confirm GitHub Actions is enabled in repository settings
4. Test token with a simple API call to verify authentication

compliance_notes.audit_trail: Build failure detected at attempt 3. No Maven build execution occurred due to workflow configuration issues. Error classification performed without access to actual build logs as no workflow run was initiated.
compliance_notes.security_impact: No security vulnerabilities detected. Configuration error prevents build execution.
compliance_notes.regulatory_compliance: Build pipeline is non-functional. CI/CD compliance requirements cannot be met until workflow is configured.

analysis_method: Configuration error classification based on workflow dispatch failure. No Maven build logs available for analysis due to missing workflow file.
